stories.title: Let's evaluate every NFC team's offseason: 16 team...
stories.summary: We're picking out the offseason's highs (Vikings getting Kyler Murray on the veterans minimum) and lows (Niners taking Kaelon Black in Round 3) for every NFC team.

stories.title: Copy of Sinner, one game from win, wilts in French exit
stories.summary: Top-ranked Jannik Sinner is out of the French Open, dropping 18 of the last 20 games en route to a second-round loss to 56th-ranked Argentine opponent Juan Manuel Cerundolo.

stories.title: Sources: Dart addresses Giants over Trump intro
stories.summary: Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart addressed teammates Wednesday during a team meeting to discuss his introduction of President Donald Trump at an event last week in New York, sources told ESPN and NFL Network.

stories.title: Ohtani dissatisfied despite L.A.'s no-hit bid, HR
stories.summary: Shohei Ohtani lamented the flaws in his performance Wednesday night -- even after hitting a leadoff home run and positioning the Dodgers for a combined no-hitter.

stories.title: Habs 'super underdogs' after G4 no-show at home
stories.summary: The Canadiens have faced elimination in these playoffs before. But never with multiple games standing between them and the offseason, which is where things stand after Montreal's 4-0 loss to Carolina in Game 4.
